page_metadata.biotools__summary: Single cell STEM (scSTEM) is a shiny app based R package for visualizing and clustering genes in pseudotime ordered single cell RNA-seq data. scSTEM is a GUI based tool and thus does not require any coding experience.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Single cell STEM (scSTEM) is a shiny app based R package for visualizing and clustering genes in pseudotime ordered single cell RNA-seq data. scSTEM is a GUI based tool and thus does not require any coding experience.
